title: Ya`bets #3258
definition:
Jabez = "sorrow"

 n pr m
 1) the head of a Calebite family

 n pr loc
 2) a town in Judah apparently near Bethlehem
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jabez = "sorrow"

 n pr m
 1) the head of a Calebite family

 n pr loc
 2) a town in Judah apparently near Bethlehem

    NASB:  a desc. of Judah, also a place in Judah
